values.value:
Dear {!Booking__r.Primary_Applicant_Name__c},
Greetings from Runwal Enterprises!!
On this special day, we would like to extend our warmest birthday wishes to you.
May your day be filled with good health, happiness, and continued success. We truly appreciate you being a valued part of the Runwal family and look forward to continuing this journey with you.
Wishing you a wonderful year ahead!
Warm regards, Runwal Enterprises
Warm Birthday Wishes from Runwal Enterprises

Happy Birthday from Runwal 🎉
Wishing you a wonderful year ahead filled with happiness, health, and success!
